question: Vertical integration means
options: How long a business takes to pay its suppliers
The same product is sold at different prices to different groups
Public companies offer shares to the general public
A business merges with another at a different stage of production
answer: A business merges with another at a different stage of production

question: The liquidity ratio measures
options: A business merges with another at a different stage of production
A business's ability to pay short-term debts
The same product is sold at different prices to different groups
Businesses act ethically and contribute to society
answer: A business's ability to pay short-term debts

question: A price floor is set
options: A business merges with a competitor at the same production level
Above equilibrium to guarantee minimum income for producers
A business merges with another at a different stage of production
Negotiation between employers and trade unions on pay and conditions
answer: Above equilibrium to guarantee minimum income for producers

question: Corporate social responsibility (CSR) means
options: A business's ability to pay short-term debts
Businesses act ethically and contribute to society
The same product is sold at different prices to different groups
How long a business takes to pay its suppliers
answer: Businesses act ethically and contribute to society

question: A joint venture involves
options: Government spending exceeds government revenue
Above equilibrium to guarantee minimum income for producers
Two or more businesses collaborating on a specific project
A few large firms dominating the industry
answer: Two or more businesses collaborating on a specific project

question: The multiplier effect in economics
options: The same product is sold at different prices to different groups
A business merges with a competitor at the same production level
An initial injection of money creates greater total income
Businesses act ethically and contribute to society
answer: An initial injection of money creates greater total income

question: Horizontal integration occurs when
options: Two or more businesses collaborating on a specific project
The proportion of a business financed by debt vs equity
A business merges with a competitor at the same production level
A few large firms dominating the industry
answer: A business merges with a competitor at the same production level

question: The accounts payable period measures
options: How long a business takes to pay its suppliers
A business merges with another at a different stage of production
The same product is sold at different prices to different groups
A few large firms dominating the industry
answer: How long a business takes to pay its suppliers

question: A budget deficit occurs when
options: Government spending exceeds government revenue
Public companies offer shares to the general public
Above equilibrium to guarantee minimum income for producers
An initial injection of money creates greater total income

question: The difference between a public and private company
options: How long a business takes to pay its suppliers
A few large firms dominating the industry
A business merges with a competitor at the same production level
Public companies offer shares to the general public
answer: Public companies offer shares to the general public

question: Opportunity cost refers to
options: A few large firms dominating the industry
The next best alternative sacrificed when making a choice
The same product is sold at different prices to different groups
A business's ability to pay short-term debts
answer: The next best alternative sacrificed when making a choice

question: A gearing ratio measures
options: Government spending exceeds government revenue
Businesses act ethically and contribute to society
Two or more businesses collaborating on a specific project
The proportion of a business financed by debt vs equity
answer: The proportion of a business financed by debt vs equity

question: Price discrimination occurs when
options: The proportion of a business financed by debt vs equity
The same product is sold at different prices to different groups
The next best alternative sacrificed when making a choice
Businesses act ethically and contribute to society
answer: The same product is sold at different prices to different groups

question: Collective bargaining is
options: Negotiation between employers and trade unions on pay and conditions
The same product is sold at different prices to different groups
A business's ability to pay short-term debts
Public companies offer shares to the general public
answer: Negotiation between employers and trade unions on pay and conditions

question: An oligopoly is a market with
options: Two or more businesses collaborating on a specific project
How long a business takes to pay its suppliers
A business merges with a competitor at the same production level
A few large firms dominating the industry
answer: A few large firms dominating the industry
